citation: 7 CFR Part 3555 + USDA SFH GLP — over default 1-4-person limit
comment: Hand-calc: household_income = $120,000 (above default $119,850 limit), household_size=4, county=Autauga AL (default). 120000 > 119850 -> income_eligible=False. Note: guarantee fees are STILL computed even when ineligible — consumer decides what to do with the numbers.
